name: Fruity Soy Shakes (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces Japanese-style soft silken tofu, chilled and cubed
2 cups fresh or frozen fruit, one or more varieties of choice
1 tablespoon honey (up to 2), or brown rice syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Process until smooth.
Yield: 2 shakes
Nutritional information per shake:
Calories: 223
Total fat: 5 grams
